passiveAbilities.name: Roley-Poley
passiveAbilities.description: Move 2" then reduce this character's Evade Stat by -2 until end of turn.

activeAbilities.name: Black Comedy
activeAbilities.description: Target other friendly character suffers 2 Wds and gains +1 energy

activeAbilities.name: Juggling fate
activeAbilities.description: Gain +2 energy. Draw the top 3 cards of the Arcane Deck, look then place them face down: one on the top of the deck, one on the bottom of the deck and one besides this character card. At any point you can add the removed card to your Arcane or Arcane Resist Hand. If you do then at the end of the action, or if this character is slain, shuffle the card back into the Arcane Deck.

arcaneAbilities.name: Butterfingers
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target loses possession of 1 Moonstone they are carrying. Place it in base contact with the target with a depth value of ‘1’.
Catastrophe: This model discards all energy.

signatureMove.name: Vanishing Balls Trick
signatureMove.endStepEffect: The enemy discards 1 energy if able. Target friendly character within 6" gains +1 energy
